name: Lamb with Honey and Almonds
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Boneless shoulder of lamb (trimmed of fat and cut into large chunks)
4 Carrots, peeled and cut into 1-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. This one-dish meal takes only 10 minutes to assemble.
2. Serve over brown rice or bulgur.
3. Soak the pot in water for 15 minutes before use.
4. Pour all ingredients, except arrowroot, into a large bowl and mix thoroughly with your hands.
5. Place the mixture in the pre-soaked pot.
6. Cover and place the pot in a cold oven.
7. Turn the temperature to 450°F.
8. Cook for 90 minutes.
9. Remove the pot from the oven.
10. Pour off the liquid into a saucepan, bring it almost to a boil, and thicken with arrowroot mixed with 2 tablespoons of water.
11. Serve with brown rice or bulgur, pouring the sauce over the rice and lamb.
